prompt: A Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print depicting gradient descent as a flowing river descending a mountain. The path zigzags downward toward a basin, symbolizing convergence to minimum. Traditional Edo-period composition with strong diagonal flow, flat unmodulated colors, indigo and muted earth tones, visible woodgrain texture, bold black outlines, stylized waves and landscape elements, no modern elements, no photorealism.
tradition_approach: Used flat colors, bold outlines, diagonal composition, and natural motifs to represent optimization flow authentically.
